Abhidhammapiṭaka/X/Suttantabhājanīyaudde.text: ( ) Idaṁ vacanaṁ “sesāni -pa- bhajantī”ti imassa vākyassa anantare bhavituṁ yuttaṁ. Dī-Ṭṭha 2. 366; Ma-Ṭṭha 1. 284 piṭṭhesu pana taṁ na dissati.
Pahānāya na bhiyyobhāvāya na vepullāya (sabbattha) Saṁ 3. 92, 93 piṭṭhesu pana passitabbaṁ.

Sammohavinodanīaṭṭhakathā/X/Suttantabhāj.text: Asuke ca asuke ca rukkhe (Sī, Syā)

Abhidhammapiṭaka/X/X/768.text: Mucatīti muti, mudatīti mudītipi pāṭho (Sī, Syā)

Abhidhammapiṭaka/X/X/849.text: Evaṁ saññaṁ mā akāsi tvaṁ puttāti (Sī, Syā)

variants.reading: Evaṁ saññaṁ mā akāsi tvaṁ puttāti

Abhidhammapiṭaka/X/X/850.text: Sakaṭena paccayaṁ detu, tayopete atappayā. (Ma-Ṭṭha 2. 45 piṭṭhe)

Sammohavinodanīaṭṭhakathā/X/X/851.text: Sakaṭena paccayaṁ detu, tayopete atappayā. (Ma-Ṭṭha 2. 45 piṭṭhe)
